title: Source-Oriented Summarization of Long Technical Texts
scenario: Develop a prompt that will produce a source-oriented summary of a long technical text, using specific sections of the original text as supporting evidence. The LLM output should be a text summary, 300-350 words in length, that clearly identifies the sources and highlights the key findings and insights from the original text.
constraints: Must include specific section references from the original text
Must maintain a logical structure and clear flow of information

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the prompt correctly identifies and incorporates specific sources from the original text
Assesses the quality and informativeness of the summary, including the accuracy of the presented information
Evaluates the logical organization and clarity of the summary, including the use of transitions and connections
Ensures the summary adheres to the target length and is not excessively long or short
